title: wilkiea smithii
intro: Wilkiea smithii, also known as the 'Native Quinine', is a plant species native to Australia. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating fever and malaria, due to its quinine-like compounds. The health benefits of Wilkiea smithii include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it a potential natural remedy for various health issues. Wilkiea smithii is often prepared as a tea or infused in hot water to be consumed, allowing its medicinal properties to be absorbed and utilized by the body.
